title: Meal Measure Portion Control Plates, Container for Weight Loss or Diet Tools, Healthy Eating Container for Balanced Meals, Red, BPA Free
description:
About this item
EASY TO USE: Measures your food right on the plate
LABELED: Cavities are labeled vegetable or fruit, starch and protein
INCLUDES: 1 Meal Measure portion control plate
BUILT TO LAST: Quality design, Built to withstand repeated use
HEALTHY LIVING: Apothecary Products helps to solve problems and work to improve wellness and health outcomes
reviews_5s:
My spouse is a wonderful cook, and she makes healthy foods, but she has a tendency to heap food on my plate. I ordered this product as a way to continue eating the healthy foods I think are good for my diet, but to get a sense of what true portions should be, and to provide visual help for anyone preparing my plate. The Meal Measurer does that job perfectly, and it is something you can use at family dinner or with friends over without embarrassment because you use your own dishes instead of marked bowls or divided plates that call attention to your dieting. Another thing I like is that all the cups are marked for full or half portions, and it specifically calls out your "starch" portion so you can't fill all the holes with mashed potatoes and call them "vegetables/fruit". I think this is an affordable, easy to use and clean product that anyone needing to watch their portion control should add to their kitchen.This makes portion controlling easy.My spouse is a wonderful cook, and she makes healthy foods, but she has a tendency to heap food on my plate. I ordered this product as a way to continue eating the healthy foods I think are good for my diet, but to get a sense of what true portions should be, and to provide visual help for anyone preparing my plate. The Meal Measurer does that job perfectly, and it is something you can use at family dinner or with friends over without embarrassment because you use your own dishes instead of marked bowls or divided plates that call attention to your dieting. Another thing I like is that all the cups are marked for full or half portions, and it specifically calls out your "starch" portion so you can't fill all the holes with mashed potatoes and call them "vegetables/fruit". I think this is an affordable, easy to use and clean product that anyone needing to watch their portion control should add to their kitchen. It is dishwasher safe and that alone makes it even more appealing.Portion control is necessary for me and probably will be forever. Measuring by eye is open to error especially if it is something I like such as mashed potatoes. The meal measure is a quick way that doesn't require searching out measuring cups. It has directions on the meal measure that tell which opening to use and what the measure is that I didn't see on the product picture. It is definitely a quicker way to serve food. Washes in top of dish washer and one product to clean instead of seveal. Can be used on smaller plates which makes the meal look larger!I bought this for my daughter, who is a Type 1 Diabetic, but found it to be perfect for my Weight Watcher's portion measurement! My daughter has to count carbs in order to calculate insulin dosage. The measurement marks on the Meal Measure make it so convenient! No more digging for a measuring cup and no more guessing. Helps with tighter control for diabetics and people watching their weight. Simple idea, but brilliant!This is a great tool to help anyone with portion control and will power. I have recently learned, that weight control is done in the kitchen and not at the gym. For years, as my weight would increase, I would go out and increase my activity level. My weight would drop, but inevitably, it would creep back up. A friend suggested that I focus on controlling the amounts of food that I ate. I found it difficult to do, until I found this handy little tool. Initially, I relied on the tool as a reminder to limit my portions. As the pounds began to melt away, I have learned how to control the portions on my own. I attribute my weight loss success to the lessons I learned from this device. Balance! Balance! Balance!This was a gift for a co-worker who has lost over 200 pounds over the last few years. She took her weight off slowly and has maintained it. She looks great and was pleased to get this product. She stated it was exactly what she needed to portion out the right amount of food for home and when having dinner with out-of-town relatives. To be honest, I personally thought it was cheaply made as it was light weight made of plastic but she said, "This is perfect!". Shows what little I know about products for weight loss since I've never had a problem with weight. Any way, a thumbs up to this product as it was good to see the smile on my co-workers face.I have fought my weight for years and at one time was up to 328 pounds. Over the last 5 or 6 years, I have managed to get down to 290 but no further. We moved to North Dakota in January 2012 and I continued the struggle until I got my portion control. Oh, I still eat wrong or I would have lost a lot more, but tomorrow August 26, 2013 is our 29 anniversary and I wanted to be below 260 pounds. I weigh 257 which is 33 pounds from where I was. I reached this little goal and now I will set another one--for me and my Meal Measure Portion Control Plate. Thank you so much. God bless, CharWhoever came up with this product is quite the clever inventor. It's so simple, I can't imagine why no one thought to
put these on the market until now. Actually they could have been around...I just never noticed, but I love it! It's not only
great for diabetics, but for anyone who is trying to cut down on what they eat. You just lay it on your plate, fill the sections up with
food (the sections are marked as to what goes in them), then lift the divider off. And there ya go!Great for measuring out food for weight control and portion size. Really makes you realize how much you are over eating and don't even realize it! It makes is so easy and effortless to measure out the correct portion and takes all the guess work out of it. The Meal Measure Tool fits right on your plate so no extra dishes to mess with and your food is nice and neat in appearance once you remove the tool. It is dishwasher safe and stores easily in the cabinet. I love mine and use it all the time.
reviews_1s:
Not real fond of this, might be my type of food, my vegetables have liquid even trying to. Drain it does not work cause it runs into other food. I am on a special diet so it would work for someone eating mash potatoes or Mac n cheese, a more solid type diet. So for me I have to score low due to my diet I am on. So that I am sure is probably not fair to the product. Sorry ;( !This seemed like a good idea, but it was a fairly useless big plastic thing. You don't really want to dirty it up with a scoop of mashed potatoes or something--just don't put a lot of food on your plate. After this sat on the counter for a while, taking up space, I put it into the bag of stuff going to one of the charitable places.Used this product a few times but its hard to determine the amount as there is a line to guide you. As your feeling the each slot the line gets harder to see. Just not what I thought it would be. Would return it but I used it a few times trying to give this a chance.

Very unhappy with the productFor me, buying this item was a waste of money. I just never used it. It might be helpful to someone else so my rating might be unfair. But I should just never have purchased this. Using a measuring cup or visualing a deck of cards, or using the palm of one's hands would be just as effective as having this.It wasn't really what I thought it was so don't waist your money on this product. Here are the measurements 1/2 cup & 1 cup so just use your measuring cups so your not stuck with a useless item.. But the seller is great got this item 3 days ahead of schedule.I like the product...but when I order this, it was listed with the pasta proportion cup and the salad dressing top. Very disappointed to get neither. Reviewed my order this morning and it was listed...then this evening it said only the plate proportion! Bummer!I like the product...but when I order this, it was listed with the pasta proportion cup and the salad dressing top. Very disappointed to get neither. Reviewed my order this morning and it was listed...then this evening it said only the plate proportion! Bummer!What was I thinking? This is a total waste of money. Haven't used it once. Big and bulky with no place to put it. I think I could have figured something out without spending the hard earned cash. Impulse Buy!!!Thought this would help with portion control...It is completely useless...Gave one to my daughter and she has yet to use it. I think we can tell how much we should be eating by using the palm theory.I bought two of these to teach health workers portion sizing. Unfortunately they are too deep and although there is a line to stop at, you can barely notice it. Complete waste of my money.
